mapper.sql: id, merchant_id, name, price, old_price, image, description, category, sales, is_discount, is_new, is_popular, on_shelf, sold_out, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM dish WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND on_shelf = 0 ORDER BY is_discount DESC, sales DESC
SELECT FROM dish WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY is_discount DESC, sales DESC
SELECT FROM dish ORDER BY merchant_id ASC, is_discount DESC, sales DESC
SELECT FROM dish WHERE is_popular = 1 AND on_shelf = 0 ORDER BY sales DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dish (merchant_id, name, price, old_price, image, description, category, sales, is_discount, is_new, is_popular, on_shelf, sold_out) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{oldPrice}, #{image}, #{description}, #{category}, #{sales}, #{isDiscount}, #{isNew}, #{isPopular}, #{onShelf}, #{soldOut})
mapper.update: UPDATE dish SET sales = sales + #{qty} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dish SET sold_out = #{soldOut} WHERE id = #{id}
